title: Flock Safety Testing and Demo Partner Agreement

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. Demo Partner Agreement
Any and all agreements, contracts, memoranda of understanding, addenda, amendments, or other written instruments — including any exhibit or attachment thereto — between the City of Dunwoody or the Dunwoody Police Department and Flock Safety governing, authorizing, or describing Dunwoody's participation as a testing or demonstration partner for Flock Safety products, features, or algorithms.
For reference, Flock Safety's public blog post dated April 16, 2026, titled "Understanding Flock's Testing and Development Program," states that Flock "works with cities and agencies, like Dunwoody, that have given authorized, explicit permission to be testing partners" and references "a demo conducted as part of authorized activity approved under the city's demo partner agreement." This request seeks that agreement and any related documents.
2. Related Records
Any communications, approvals, authorizations, or internal correspondence related to the execution of or participation in the above-referenced testing or demo partner agreement, including but not limited to records reflecting who authorized the agreement on behalf of the City of Dunwoody or the Dunwoody Police Department.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar
